beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: I — yeah. I did. I — do you have a coaster or something, I don't want to put my keys on —

beats.speaker: Sharon
beats.text: Dave. Breathe. Room's on me — for now.
The neon VACANCY sign buzzes overhead. A moth dies in it. Loudly.

inside.text: Sharon pulls a keycard from her bra. The door clicks. You follow like a man being led to a nice, warm trap.

beats.speaker: Sharon
beats.text: Your loss. Tell Karen I said hi. Or don't.
You walk back to the car faster than a man with nothing to hide would walk.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: I — I got these. From the cart. Carne asada. I think.

beats.speaker: Sharon
beats.text: Dave. You brought me motel tacos. That's the nicest thing a married man has done for me this month.
